title: Relaxed Portuguese Egg Spring Rolls
description: A lazy Sunday Portuguese dish featuring egg roll wrappers and infused oil, perfect for a relaxing meal. It has a nice balance of mustardy and aerated flavors.

ingredients.name: egg roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: found in the frozen food section

ingredients.name: infused oil
ingredients.notes: use a neutral oil like canola or grapeseed

ingredients.name: chopped scallions
ingredients.notes: use the green and white parts

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: use a mild cheese like mozzarella or Monterey Jack

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together the infused oil, mustard, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs until they are lightly aerated.
Add the chopped scallions and shredded cheese to the eggs and stir until they are fully incorporated.
Lay an egg roll wrapper on a flat surface and brush the edges with the infused oil mixture.
Place about 1/4 cup of the egg mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Place the rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the wrappers are golden brown.
Serve the rolls hot and enjoy.
